title: Vanilla Legacy
description: Build mods that do not change the coordination of the main game. The main focus is on exploring the world and new dungeons. The build is well optimized.
body: Build mods that do not change the coordination of the main game. The main focus is on exploring the world and new dungeons. The build is well optimized. Enjoy the game. The build contains mods for generation, animals, cooking, betternether and bitter end, and many mods for optimizing and improving the game's benefits.
